words.zh: n. 大量, 眾多; 二十( score的名詞複數 ); （遊戲或比賽中的）得分; 大量; 百分數

words.def: a number or letter indicating quality (especially of a student's performance)
words.zh: n. 得分, 抓痕, 二十個, 刻痕, 帳目, 樂譜, 起跑線, 終點線, 大量

words.def: a wooden structure consisting of an upright post with a transverse piece
words.zh: n. 十字架, 十字架形物件, 交叉, 十字標, 交叉路, 磨難, 雜交

words.def: a small group of indispensable persons or things
words.zh: n. 核心, 果心, 要點

words.def: any of many shrubs of the genus Rosa that bear roses
words.zh: n. 玫瑰, 薔薇, 玫瑰色
